rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MOHAMMAD SHAIBI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: continued to february 1, 2017 for proper notice of the amended petition. notice was mailed 1/2/17, but the amended petition was not filed until 1/11/17 (see Local Rule 14.21.A.). new notice must be mailed no later than 1/17/17 and amended proof of service filed by 1/27/17. NOTE-->the new NOH must identify the document filed as an AMENDED Spousal Property Petition. putting "amended" in the caption of the form, as on the NOH form filed 1/11/17 is not sufficient.
